task_description: find all log files, extract timestamps, compute activity by hour of day, save the results to CSV, and print the busiest hour

messages.content:
```sh
find . -name "*.log" > log_files.txt
```

This command finds all `.log` files in the current directory and its subdirectories, listing them in `log_files.txt`.
